import json

# Load metadata
with open\("monitor/_csv_meta.json"\) as f:
    csv_meta = json.load\(f\)
with open\("monitor/_all_xlsx_meta.json"\) as f:
    xlsx_meta = json.load\(f\)

# Print sample values for a few key files to help write column descriptions
for name in ["CONTRATOS.csv", "FINANCIADORES.csv", "contratos-campanas.csv"]:
    m = csv_meta[name]
    print\(f"\\n=== {name} ==="\)
    for c in m["columns"]:
        print\(f"  {c}: {m['sample_values'].get\(c, []\)}"\)

PYEOF)
